mapper.insert: insert into counselor_category_weight (counselor_id, category_code, category_name, weight, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{counselorId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})

insert into counselor_category_weight (counselor_id, category_code, category_name, weight, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{weight.counselorId}, #{weight.categoryCode}, #{weight.categoryName}, #{weight.weight}, #{weight.status}, #{weight.createTime}, #{weight.updateTime}, #{weight.deleted})
mapper.select: select * from counselor_category_weight where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select * from counselor_category_weight where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and deleted = 0 order by category_code asc
select * from counselor_category_weight where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and status = 1 and deleted = 0 order by category_code asc
select * from counselor_category_weight where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and category_code = #{categoryCode} and deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update counselor_category_weight
category_code = #{categoryCode},
category_name = #{categoryName},
weight = #{weight},
status = #{status},
deleted = #{deleted},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update counselor_category_weight set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
update counselor_category_weight set deleted = 1 where counselor_id = #{counselorId}
update counselor_category_weight set deleted = 1 where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and category_code = #{categoryCode}
mapper.select: select COALESCE(sum(weight), 0) from counselor_category_weight where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and status = 1 and deleted = 0
